data.title: [UPDATE] test-ticket-transition-flock.sh: verify flock boundary not widened after S2 consolidation
data.description: Create or update tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition-flock.sh to add a structural assertion that verifies the flock critical section in ticket-transition.sh is not widened. Assertion: grep the flock acquire line (fcntl.LOCK_EX) and the flock release line; assert that the to_llm/llm_format import does NOT appear inside the flock section (between lock acquire and release). The flock section must contain only: status read, status verify, status event write, git commit. LLM formatting happens outside the lock. testing_mode: UPDATE.
